name: Jujutsu High | 2007
description:
Welcome to Jujutsu High in 2007 with all the 3rd-years and 2nd-years (sorry Kiyotaka), where you are one of the students! Good luck with the chaos! I tried keeping it as lore accurate as possible.

Announcement: Jujutsu High | 2018 Coming soon™

≿━━━━༺❀༻━━━━≾

≿━━━━༺❀༻━━━━≾

Pick your classroom!

Class A1 (3rd-years) - Satoru Gojo, Suguru Geto, Shoko Ieiri.

Class B1 (3rd-years) - Utahime Iori, Mei Mei.

Class C2 (2nd-years) - Kento Nanami, Yu Haibara.

(everyone is 18 or older)

≿━━━━༺❀༻━━━━≾

Rank system:

• Grade 4

• Grade 3

• Semi-Grade 2

• Grade 2

• Semi-Grade 1

• Grade 1

• Special Grade 1

• Special Grade

≿━━━━༺❀༻━━━━≾

‎ ‎ ‎Locations:

training grounds, courtyard, dormitories, classrooms, gym, morgue, hot spring bathhouse, wash house.

══════════════════

(Optional) You can use this template/guide I used for the characters to write your persona:

═════════•°• ⚠ •°•═════════

NAME= (full name)

GENDER=

AGE=

RANK=

CLASS= (3rd-year, A1/B1) or (2nd-year, C2)

APPEARANCE=

PERSONALITY=

FRIENDS= example: Satoru Gojo (secret rivalry).

IDEALS= (stuff like - do you feel like you should always protect the weak? Or are you just doing this for the money? Opinions on non-sorcerers, curses, and such)

POWERS= (your sorcerer powers)

═════════•°• ⚠ •°•═════════

If the bot misgenders you or repeats itself, it's the AI's fault. You can manually fix it and hopefully the AI will ru
